./queryClient.ts
import { QueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query';

export const queryClient = new QueryClient({
  defaultOptions: {
    queries: {
      staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
      retry: 1,
      refetchOnWindowFocus: false,
    },
    mutations: {
      retry: 0,
    },
  },
});
./http/httpClient.ts
import Axios, { AxiosRequestConfig, AxiosError } from 'axios';

const BASE_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3001';

export const AXIOS_INSTANCE = Axios.create({
  baseURL: `${BASE_URL}/api/v1/wms`,
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
});

AXIOS_INSTANCE.interceptors.request.use(
  (config) => {
    const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token');
    if (token) {
      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
    }
    const tenantCode = localStorage.getItem('tenant_code');
    if (tenantCode) {
      config.headers['X-Tenant-Code'] = tenantCode;
    }
    return config;
  },
  (error) => Promise.reject(error),
);

AXIOS_INSTANCE.interceptors.response.use(
  (response) => response,
  (error: AxiosError) => {
    if (error.response?.status === 401) {
      localStorage.removeItem('auth_token');
      window.location.href = '/login';
    }
    return Promise.reject(error);
  },
);

export const customInstance = <T>(
  config: AxiosRequestConfig,
  options?: AxiosRequestConfig,
): Promise<T> => {
  const promise = AXIOS_INSTANCE({
    ...config,
    ...options,
  }).then(({ data }) => data);

  return promise;
};

export default customInstance;
./api/wms-api/wms-web/wms-web.ts
/**
 * Generated by orval v8.12.3 🍺

 * OpenAPI spec version: 1.0.0

import {
  useMutation,
  useQuery
} from '@tanstack/react-query';
import type {
  MutationFunction,
  QueryFunction,
  QueryKey,
  UseMutationOptions,
  UseMutationResult,
  UseQueryOptions,
  UseQueryResult
} from '@tanstack/react-query';

import type {
  AllocationOverrideDto,
  ApproveApprovalDto,
  CountWebControllerListParams,
  CreateAdjustmentDto,
  CreateAsnDto,
  CreateGrnAdHocDto,
  CreateGrnFromAsnDto,
  CreateOrderDto,
  CreateProductDto,
  CreateTransferDto,
  CreateWaveDto,
  GenerateManifestDto,
  InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardParams,
  InventoryWebControllerGetLowStockParams,
  InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams,
  InventoryWebControllerListAdjustmentsParams,
  InventoryWebControllerListHoldsParams,
  NotificationAdminControllerGetComplianceOverridesParams,
  NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams,
  NotificationAdminControllerGetPreferencesProxyParams,
  OutboundWebControllerGetPendingAllocationsParams,
  OutboundWebControllerGetWaveBoardParams,
  OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams,

  UpdateProductDto,
  UpsertPolicyDto
} from '../../../types/wms-api';

import { customInstance } from '../../../http/httpClient';


type SecondParameter<T extends (...args: never) => unknown> = Parameters<T>[1];



export type NotificationAdminController_getLogsResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type NotificationAdminController_getLogsResponseSuccess = (NotificationAdminController_getLogsResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type NotificationAdminController_getLogsResponse = (NotificationAdminController_getLogsResponseSuccess)

export const getNotificationAdminControllerGetLogsUrl = (params: NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/notifications/logs?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/notifications/logs`
}

export const NotificationAdminController_getLogs = async (params: NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<NotificationAdminController_getLogsResponse> => {

  return customInstance<NotificationAdminController_getLogsResponse>(getNotificationAdminControllerGetLogsUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getNotificationAdminControllerGetLogsMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationAdminController_getLogs>>, TError,{params: NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationAdminController_getLogs>>, TError,{params: NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['notificationAdminControllerGetLogs'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationAdminController_getLogs>>, {params: NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams}> = (props) => {
          const {params} = props ?? {};

          return  NotificationAdminController_getLogs(params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationAdminController_getLogs>>>

    export type NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsMutationError = unknown

    export const useNotificationAdminControllerGetLogs = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationAdminController_getLogs>>, TError,{params: NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationAdminController_getLogs>>,
        TError,
        {params: NotificationAdminControllerGetLogsParams},
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getNotificationAdminControllerGetLogsMutationOptions(options));
    }

export const getNotificationAdminControllerGetComplianceOverridesUrl = (params: NotificationAdminControllerGetComplianceOverridesParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/notifications/compliance-overrides?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/notifications/compliance-overrides`
}

export const getReportsControllerRequestReportUrl = () => {




  return `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/reports/request`
}

export const ReportsController_requestReport = async (reportRequestDto: ReportRequestDto, options?: RequestInit): Promise<ReportsController_requestReportResponse> => {

  return customInstance<ReportsController_requestReportResponse>(getReportsControllerRequestReportUrl(),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(reportRequestDto)
  }
);}





export const getReportsControllerRequestReportQueryKey = (reportRequestDto?: ReportRequestDto,) => {
    return [
    'POST', `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/reports/request`, reportRequestDto
    ] as const;
    }


export const getReportsControllerRequestReportQueryOptions = <TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_requestReport>>, TError = unknown>(reportRequestDto: ReportRequestDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_requestReport>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getReportsControllerRequestReportQueryKey(reportRequestDto);



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_requestReport>>> = ({ signal }) => ReportsController_requestReport(reportRequestDto, { signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_requestReport>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type ReportsControllerRequestReportQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_requestReport>>>
export type ReportsControllerRequestReportQueryError = unknown



export function useReportsControllerRequestReport<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_requestReport>>, TError = unknown>(
 reportRequestDto: ReportRequestDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_requestReport>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getReportsControllerRequestReportQueryOptions(reportRequestDto,options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

export const getReportsControllerGetStatusUrl = (jobId: string,) => {

}

export const ReportsController_getStatus = async (jobId: string, options?: RequestInit): Promise<ReportsController_getStatusResponse> => {

  return customInstance<ReportsController_getStatusResponse>(getReportsControllerGetStatusUrl(jobId),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getReportsControllerGetStatusMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_getStatus>>, TError,{jobId: string}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_getStatus>>, TError,{jobId: string}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['reportsControllerGetStatus'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_getStatus>>, {jobId: string}> = (props) => {
          const {jobId} = props ?? {};

          return  ReportsController_getStatus(jobId,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type ReportsControllerGetStatusMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_getStatus>>>

    export type ReportsControllerGetStatusMutationError = unknown

    export const useReportsControllerGetStatus = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_getStatus>>, TError,{jobId: string}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_getStatus>>,
        TError,
        {jobId: string},
        TContext
      > => {

    export type ReportsController_downloadLiveResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type ReportsController_downloadLiveResponseSuccess = (ReportsController_downloadLiveResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type ReportsController_downloadLiveResponse = (ReportsController_downloadLiveResponseSuccess)

export const getReportsControllerDownloadLiveUrl = (params: ReportsControllerDownloadLiveParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/reports/download?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/reports/download`
}

export const ReportsController_downloadLive = async (params: ReportsControllerDownloadLiveParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<ReportsController_downloadLiveResponse> => {

  return customInstance<ReportsController_downloadLiveResponse>(getReportsControllerDownloadLiveUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getReportsControllerDownloadLiveMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_downloadLive>>, TError,{params: ReportsControllerDownloadLiveParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_downloadLive>>, TError,{params: ReportsControllerDownloadLiveParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['reportsControllerDownloadLive'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_downloadLive>>, {params: ReportsControllerDownloadLiveParams}> = (props) => {
          const {params} = props ?? {};

          return  ReportsController_downloadLive(params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type ReportsControllerDownloadLiveMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_downloadLive>>>

    export type ReportsControllerDownloadLiveMutationError = unknown

    export const useReportsControllerDownloadLive = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_downloadLive>>, TError,{params: ReportsControllerDownloadLiveParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ReportsController_downloadLive>>,
        TError,
        {params: ReportsControllerDownloadLiveParams},
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getReportsControllerDownloadLiveMutationOptions(options));

export const getProductsWebControllerCreateUrl = () => {




  return `/api/v1/wms/web/products`
}

export const ProductsWebController_create = async (createProductDto: CreateProductDto, options?: RequestInit): Promise<ProductsWebController_createResponse> => {

  return customInstance<ProductsWebController_createResponse>(getProductsWebControllerCreateUrl(),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(createProductDto)
  }
);}





export const getProductsWebControllerCreateQueryKey = (createProductDto?: CreateProductDto,) => {
    return [
    'POST', `/api/v1/wms/web/products`, createProductDto
    ] as const;
    }


export const getProductsWebControllerCreateQueryOptions = <TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_create>>, TError = unknown>(createProductDto: CreateProductDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_create>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getProductsWebControllerCreateQueryKey(createProductDto);



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_create>>> = ({ signal }) => ProductsWebController_create(createProductDto, { signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_create>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type ProductsWebControllerCreateQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_create>>>
export type ProductsWebControllerCreateQueryError = unknown



export function useProductsWebControllerCreate<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_create>>, TError = unknown>(
 createProductDto: CreateProductDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_create>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getProductsWebControllerCreateQueryOptions(createProductDto,options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

  headers: Headers;
};

export const getProductsWebControllerFindAllUrl = (params?: ProductsWebControllerFindAllParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/web/products?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/web/products`
}

export const ProductsWebController_findAll = async (params?: ProductsWebControllerFindAllParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<ProductsWebController_findAllResponse> => {

  return customInstance<ProductsWebController_findAllResponse>(getProductsWebControllerFindAllUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}

    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_findAll>>, TError,{params?: ProductsWebControllerFindAllParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_findAll>>, {params?: ProductsWebControllerFindAllParams}> = (props) => {
          const {params} = props ?? {};

          return  ProductsWebController_findAll(params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

export const getProductsWebControllerUpdateUrl = (id: string,) => {




  return `/api/v1/wms/web/products/${id}`
}

export const ProductsWebController_update = async (id: string,
    updateProductDto: UpdateProductDto, options?: RequestInit): Promise<ProductsWebController_updateResponse> => {

  return customInstance<ProductsWebController_updateResponse>(getProductsWebControllerUpdateUrl(id),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'PATCH',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(updateProductDto)
  }
);}





export const getProductsWebControllerUpdateQueryKey = (id: string,
    updateProductDto?: UpdateProductDto,) => {
    return [
    'PATCH', `/api/v1/wms/web/products/${id}`, updateProductDto
    ] as const;
    }


export const getProductsWebControllerUpdateQueryOptions = <TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_update>>, TError = unknown>(id: string,
    updateProductDto: UpdateProductDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_update>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getProductsWebControllerUpdateQueryKey(id,updateProductDto);



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_update>>> = ({ signal }) => ProductsWebController_update(id,updateProductDto, { signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, enabled: id !== null && id !== undefined, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_update>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type ProductsWebControllerUpdateQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_update>>>
export type ProductsWebControllerUpdateQueryError = unknown



export function useProductsWebControllerUpdate<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_update>>, TError = unknown>(
 id: string,
    updateProductDto: UpdateProductDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_update>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getProductsWebControllerUpdateQueryOptions(id,updateProductDto,options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

    ] as const;

export const getProductsWebControllerRemoveQueryOptions = <TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_remove>>, TError = unknown>(id: string, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_remove>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getProductsWebControllerRemoveQueryKey(id);



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_remove>>> = ({ signal }) => ProductsWebController_remove(id, { signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, enabled: id !== null && id !== undefined, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_remove>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type ProductsWebControllerRemoveQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_remove>>>
export type ProductsWebControllerRemoveQueryError = unknown



export function useProductsWebControllerRemove<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_remove>>, TError = unknown>(
 id: string, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsWebController_remove>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getProductsWebControllerRemoveQueryOptions(id,options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

export type InventoryWebController_getStockResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type InventoryWebController_getStockResponseSuccess = (InventoryWebController_getStockResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type InventoryWebController_getStockResponse = (InventoryWebController_getStockResponseSuccess)

export const getInventoryWebControllerGetStockUrl = (params?: InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/inventory/stock?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/inventory/stock`
}

export const InventoryWebController_getStock = async (params?: InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<InventoryWebController_getStockResponse> => {

  return customInstance<InventoryWebController_getStockResponse>(getInventoryWebControllerGetStockUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getInventoryWebControllerGetStockMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryWebController_getStock>>, TError,{params?: InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryWebController_getStock>>, TError,{params?: InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['inventoryWebControllerGetStock'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryWebController_getStock>>, {params?: InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams}> = (props) => {
          const {params} = props ?? {};

          return  InventoryWebController_getStock(params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type InventoryWebControllerGetStockMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryWebController_getStock>>>

    export type InventoryWebControllerGetStockMutationError = unknown

    export const useInventoryWebControllerGetStock = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryWebController_getStock>>, TError,{params?: InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryWebController_getStock>>,
        TError,
        {params?: InventoryWebControllerGetStockParams},
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getInventoryWebControllerGetStockMutationOptions(options));
    }

  {
    ...options,
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(createAsnDto)
  }
);}

export type InboundWebController_getPutawayBoardResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type InboundWebController_getPutawayBoardResponseSuccess = (InboundWebController_getPutawayBoardResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type InboundWebController_getPutawayBoardResponse = (InboundWebController_getPutawayBoardResponseSuccess)

export const getInboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardUrl = (params: InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/inbound/putaway/board?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/inbound/putaway/board`
}

export const InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard = async (params: InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<InboundWebController_getPutawayBoardResponse> => {

  return customInstance<InboundWebController_getPutawayBoardResponse>(getInboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getInboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard>>, TError,{params: InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard>>, TError,{params: InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['inboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoard'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard>>, {params: InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardParams}> = (props) => {
          const {params} = props ?? {};

          return  InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard(params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard>>>

    export type InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardMutationError = unknown

    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard>>, TError,{params: InboundWebControllerGetPutawayBoardParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundWebController_getPutawayBoard>>,

  {
    ...options,

export type OutboundWebController_listOrdersResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type OutboundWebController_listOrdersResponseSuccess = (OutboundWebController_listOrdersResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type OutboundWebController_listOrdersResponse = (OutboundWebController_listOrdersResponseSuccess)

export const getOutboundWebControllerListOrdersUrl = (params: OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/outbound/orders?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/outbound/orders`
}

export const OutboundWebController_listOrders = async (params: OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<OutboundWebController_listOrdersResponse> => {

  return customInstance<OutboundWebController_listOrdersResponse>(getOutboundWebControllerListOrdersUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getOutboundWebControllerListOrdersMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof OutboundWebController_listOrders>>, TError,{params: OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof OutboundWebController_listOrders>>, TError,{params: OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['outboundWebControllerListOrders'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof OutboundWebController_listOrders>>, {params: OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams}> = (props) => {
          const {params} = props ?? {};

          return  OutboundWebController_listOrders(params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type OutboundWebControllerListOrdersMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof OutboundWebController_listOrders>>>

    export type OutboundWebControllerListOrdersMutationError = unknown

    export const useOutboundWebControllerListOrders = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof OutboundWebController_listOrders>>, TError,{params: OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof OutboundWebController_listOrders>>,
        TError,
        {params: OutboundWebControllerListOrdersParams},

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/outbound/allocations/pending?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/outbound/allocations/pending`

export const getTransferWebControllerListUrl = (params: TransferWebControllerListParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/transfers?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/transfers`
}

);}





export const getTransferWebControllerDispatchQueryKey = (id: string,) => {
    return [

export type CountWebController_listResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type CountWebController_listResponseSuccess = (CountWebController_listResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type CountWebController_listResponse = (CountWebController_listResponseSuccess)

export const getCountWebControllerListUrl = (params: CountWebControllerListParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/cycle-counts?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/web/cycle-counts`
}

export const CountWebController_list = async (params: CountWebControllerListParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<CountWebController_listResponse> => {

  return customInstance<CountWebController_listResponse>(getCountWebControllerListUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getCountWebControllerListMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountWebController_list>>, TError,{params: CountWebControllerListParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountWebController_list>>, TError,{params: CountWebControllerListParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['countWebControllerList'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountWebController_list>>, {params: CountWebControllerListParams}> = (props) => {
          const {params} = props ?? {};

          return  CountWebController_list(params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type CountWebControllerListMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountWebController_list>>>

    export type CountWebControllerListMutationError = unknown

    export const useCountWebControllerList = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountWebController_list>>, TError,{params: CountWebControllerListParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountWebController_list>>,
        TError,
        {params: CountWebControllerListParams},
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getCountWebControllerListMutationOptions(options));
    }

/**
 * Generated by orval v8.12.3 🍺
 * Do not edit manually.
 * ElasticWMS API
 * Warehouse Management System API - Web, RF, and Integration endpoints
 * OpenAPI spec version: 1.0.0
 */
import {
  useMutation,
  useQuery
} from '@tanstack/react-query';
import type {
  MutationFunction,
  QueryFunction,
  QueryKey,
  UseMutationOptions,
  UseMutationResult,
  UseQueryOptions,
  UseQueryResult
} from '@tanstack/react-query';

import type {
  EvaluateRuleDto,
  ExecuteTransitionDto,
  ExecutionControllerListParams,
  StartProcessDto,
  UpsertBpmnProcessDto,
  UpsertRuleDto,
  UpsertStateMachineDto,
  WmsStateMachineControllerListParams
} from '../../../types/wms-api';

import { customInstance } from '../../../http/httpClient';


type SecondParameter<T extends (...args: never) => unknown> = Parameters<T>[1];

export type WmsStateMachineController_listResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type WmsStateMachineController_listResponseSuccess = (WmsStateMachineController_listResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type WmsStateMachineController_listResponse = (WmsStateMachineController_listResponseSuccess)

export const getWmsStateMachineControllerListUrl = (params: WmsStateMachineControllerListParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/web/customization/state-machines?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/web/customization/state-machines`
}

export const WmsStateMachineController_list = async (params: WmsStateMachineControllerListParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<WmsStateMachineController_listResponse> => {

  return customInstance<WmsStateMachineController_listResponse>(getWmsStateMachineControllerListUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getWmsStateMachineControllerListMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getWmsRuleControllerUpdateQueryKey(key);

   return  { queryKey, queryFn, enabled: key !== null && key !== undefined, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsRuleController_update>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type WmsRuleControllerUpdateQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsRuleController_update>>>
export type WmsRuleControllerUpdateQueryError = unknown



export function useWmsRuleControllerUpdate<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsRuleController_update>>, TError = unknown>(
 key: string, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsRuleController_update>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getWmsRuleControllerUpdateQueryOptions(key,options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }

export const getWmsBpmnControllerListMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_list>>, TError,void, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_list>>, TError,void, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['wmsBpmnControllerList'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_list>>, void> = () => {


          return  WmsBpmnController_list(requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type WmsBpmnControllerListMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_list>>>

    export type WmsBpmnControllerListMutationError = unknown

    export const useWmsBpmnControllerList = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_list>>, TError,void, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_list>>,
        TError,
        void,
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getWmsBpmnControllerListMutationOptions(options));
    }

) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getWmsBpmnControllerCreateQueryKey(upsertBpmnProcessDto);



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_create>>> = ({ signal }) => WmsBpmnController_create(upsertBpmnProcessDto, { signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_create>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type WmsBpmnControllerCreateQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_create>>>

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };

export const getWmsBpmnControllerGetMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_get>>, TError,{key: string}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_get>>, TError,{key: string}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['wmsBpmnControllerGet'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_get>>, {key: string}> = (props) => {
          const {key} = props ?? {};

          return  WmsBpmnController_get(key,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type WmsBpmnControllerGetMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_get>>>

    export type WmsBpmnControllerGetMutationError = unknown

    export const useWmsBpmnControllerGet = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_get>>, TError,{key: string}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WmsBpmnController_get>>,
        TError,
        {key: string},
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getWmsBpmnControllerGetMutationOptions(options));
    }

export type ExecutionController_listResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type ExecutionController_listResponseSuccess = (ExecutionController_listResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type ExecutionController_listResponse = (ExecutionController_listResponseSuccess)

export const getExecutionControllerListUrl = (params?: ExecutionControllerListParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/web/customization/executions?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/web/customization/executions`
}

export const ExecutionController_list = async (params?: ExecutionControllerListParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<ExecutionController_listResponse> => {

  return customInstance<ExecutionController_listResponse>(getExecutionControllerListUrl(params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}

 * Receives Shopify order/product webhooks with HMAC verification, SHA256 dedup, and PendingOrderBuffer for out-of-order events
 * @summary Shopify webhook receiver
 */

  return customInstance<WebhooksController_shopifyWebhookResponse>(getWebhooksControllerShopifyWebhookUrl(tenantCode),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'POST'


  }
);}

) => {

   return  { queryKey, queryFn, enabled: tenantCode !== null && tenantCode !== undefined, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof WebhooksController_shopifyWebhook>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

export type StorageLocationController_findByCodeWebResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type StorageLocationController_findByCodeWebResponseSuccess = (StorageLocationController_findByCodeWebResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type StorageLocationController_findByCodeWebResponse = (StorageLocationController_findByCodeWebResponseSuccess)

export const getStorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebUrl = (code: string,
    params: StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/web/by-code/${code}?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/web/by-code/${code}`
}

export const StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb = async (code: string,
    params: StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<StorageLocationController_findByCodeWebResponse> => {

  return customInstance<StorageLocationController_findByCodeWebResponse>(getStorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebUrl(code,params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getStorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb>>, TError,{code: string;params: StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb>>, TError,{code: string;params: StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['storageLocationControllerFindByCodeWeb'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb>>, {code: string;params: StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebParams}> = (props) => {
          const {code,params} = props ?? {};

          return  StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb(code,params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb>>>

    export type StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebMutationError = unknown

    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb>>, TError,{code: string;params: StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeWebParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof StorageLocationController_findByCodeWeb>>,

  headers: Headers;

export type StorageLocationController_findByCodeRfResponse = (StorageLocationController_findByCodeRfResponseSuccess)

export const getStorageLocationControllerFindByCodeRfUrl = (code: string,
    params: StorageLocationControllerFindByCodeRfParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/rf/by-code/${code}?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/rf/by-code/${code}`
}

  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}

      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/web/zones?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/web/zones`

 * Generated by orval v8.12.3 🍺
 * Do not edit manually.
 * ElasticWMS API

 * OpenAPI spec version: 1.0.0

  useQuery
} from '@tanstack/react-query';

  QueryFunction,
  QueryKey,
  UseQueryOptions,
  UseQueryResult
} from '@tanstack/react-query';

import { customInstance } from '../../../http/httpClient';


type SecondParameter<T extends (...args: never) => unknown> = Parameters<T>[1];

        }

      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof RfSessionController_get>>, {id: string}> = (props) => {
          const {id} = props ?? {};

          return  RfSessionController_get(id,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    }

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getNotificationRfControllerPollQueryKey();



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationRfController_poll>>> = ({ signal }) => NotificationRfController_poll({ signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationRfController_poll>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type NotificationRfControllerPollQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationRfController_poll>>>
export type NotificationRfControllerPollQueryError = unknown



export function useNotificationRfControllerPoll<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationRfController_poll>>, TError = unknown>(
  options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof NotificationRfController_poll>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getNotificationRfControllerPollQueryOptions(options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

  }
);}




export const getProductsRfControllerFindByBarcodeMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsRfController_findByBarcode>>, TError,{code: string}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsRfController_findByBarcode>>, TError,{code: string}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['productsRfControllerFindByBarcode'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsRfController_findByBarcode>>, {code: string}> = (props) => {
          const {code} = props ?? {};

          return  ProductsRfController_findByBarcode(code,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type ProductsRfControllerFindByBarcodeMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsRfController_findByBarcode>>>

 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ProductsRfController_findByBarcode>>,
        TError,
        {code: string},
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getProductsRfControllerFindByBarcodeMutationOptions(options));
    }

export type InventoryRfController_lookupLotResponse200 = {
  data: void
  status: 200
}

export type InventoryRfController_lookupLotResponseSuccess = (InventoryRfController_lookupLotResponse200) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type InventoryRfController_lookupLotResponse = (InventoryRfController_lookupLotResponseSuccess)

export const getInventoryRfControllerLookupLotUrl = (lotNumber: string,
    params: InventoryRfControllerLookupLotParams,) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {

    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? 'null' : String(value))
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0 ? `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/inventory/lot/${lotNumber}?${stringifiedParams}` : `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/inventory/lot/${lotNumber}`
}

export const InventoryRfController_lookupLot = async (lotNumber: string,
    params: InventoryRfControllerLookupLotParams, options?: RequestInit): Promise<InventoryRfController_lookupLotResponse> => {

  return customInstance<InventoryRfController_lookupLotResponse>(getInventoryRfControllerLookupLotUrl(lotNumber,params),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getInventoryRfControllerLookupLotMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryRfController_lookupLot>>, TError,{lotNumber: string;params: InventoryRfControllerLookupLotParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryRfController_lookupLot>>, TError,{lotNumber: string;params: InventoryRfControllerLookupLotParams}, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['inventoryRfControllerLookupLot'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryRfController_lookupLot>>, {lotNumber: string;params: InventoryRfControllerLookupLotParams}> = (props) => {
          const {lotNumber,params} = props ?? {};

          return  InventoryRfController_lookupLot(lotNumber,params,requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type InventoryRfControllerLookupLotMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryRfController_lookupLot>>>

    export type InventoryRfControllerLookupLotMutationError = unknown

    export const useInventoryRfControllerLookupLot = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryRfController_lookupLot>>, TError,{lotNumber: string;params: InventoryRfControllerLookupLotParams}, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InventoryRfController_lookupLot>>,
        TError,
        {lotNumber: string;params: InventoryRfControllerLookupLotParams},
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getInventoryRfControllerLookupLotMutationOptions(options));
    }

export const getInboundRfControllerCompleteReceivingQueryKey = () => {
    return [
    'POST', `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/inbound/receive/complete`
    ] as const;

) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getInboundRfControllerCompleteReceivingQueryKey();



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_completeReceiving>>> = ({ signal }) => InboundRfController_completeReceiving({ signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_completeReceiving>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }

  return `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/inbound/qc/result`

export const InboundRfController_qcResult = async (qcRfResultDto: QcRfResultDto, options?: RequestInit): Promise<InboundRfController_qcResultResponse> => {

  return customInstance<InboundRfController_qcResultResponse>(getInboundRfControllerQcResultUrl(),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(qcRfResultDto)
  }
);}

    return [
    'POST', `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/inbound/qc/result`, qcRfResultDto
    ] as const;
    }

    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_qcResult>>> = ({ signal }) => InboundRfController_qcResult(qcRfResultDto, { signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_qcResult>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }

  {
    ...options,
    method: 'GET'


  }
);}




export const getInboundRfControllerGetNextPutawayMutationOptions = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_getNextPutaway>>, TError,void, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
): UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_getNextPutaway>>, TError,void, TContext> => {

const mutationKey = ['inboundRfControllerGetNextPutaway'];
const {mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?
      options.mutation && 'mutationKey' in options.mutation && options.mutation.mutationKey ?
      options
      : {...options, mutation: {...options.mutation, mutationKey}}
      : {mutation: { mutationKey, }, request: undefined};




      const mutationFn: MutationFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_getNextPutaway>>, void> = () => {


          return  InboundRfController_getNextPutaway(requestOptions)
        }






  return  { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions }}

    export type InboundRfControllerGetNextPutawayMutationResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_getNextPutaway>>>

    export type InboundRfControllerGetNextPutawayMutationError = unknown

    export const useInboundRfControllerGetNextPutaway = <TError = unknown,
    TContext = unknown>(options?: { mutation?:UseMutationOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_getNextPutaway>>, TError,void, TContext>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
 ): UseMutationResult<
        Awaited<ReturnType<typeof InboundRfController_getNextPutaway>>,
        TError,
        void,
        TContext
      > => {
      return useMutation(getInboundRfControllerGetNextPutawayMutationOptions(options));
    }

;

export type CountRfController_startResponse = (CountRfController_startResponseSuccess)

export const getCountRfControllerStartUrl = () => {




  return `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/cycle-counts/start`
}

export const CountRfController_start = async ( options?: RequestInit): Promise<CountRfController_startResponse> => {

  return customInstance<CountRfController_startResponse>(getCountRfControllerStartUrl(),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'POST'


  }
);}





export const getCountRfControllerStartQueryKey = () => {
    return [
    'POST', `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/cycle-counts/start`
    ] as const;
    }


export const getCountRfControllerStartQueryOptions = <TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_start>>, TError = unknown>( options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_start>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getCountRfControllerStartQueryKey();



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_start>>> = ({ signal }) => CountRfController_start({ signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_start>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type CountRfControllerStartQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_start>>>
export type CountRfControllerStartQueryError = unknown



export function useCountRfControllerStart<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_start>>, TError = unknown>(
  options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_start>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getCountRfControllerStartQueryOptions(options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

export type CountRfController_enterQtyResponse201 = {
  data: void
  status: 201
}

export type CountRfController_enterQtyResponseSuccess = (CountRfController_enterQtyResponse201) & {
  headers: Headers;
};
;

export type CountRfController_enterQtyResponse = (CountRfController_enterQtyResponseSuccess)

export const getCountRfControllerEnterQtyUrl = () => {




  return `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/cycle-counts/enter-qty`
}

export const CountRfController_enterQty = async (submitCountLineDto: SubmitCountLineDto, options?: RequestInit): Promise<CountRfController_enterQtyResponse> => {

  return customInstance<CountRfController_enterQtyResponse>(getCountRfControllerEnterQtyUrl(),
  {
    ...options,
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(submitCountLineDto)
  }
);}





export const getCountRfControllerEnterQtyQueryKey = (submitCountLineDto?: SubmitCountLineDto,) => {
    return [
    'POST', `/api/v1/wms/api/v1/wms/rf/cycle-counts/enter-qty`, submitCountLineDto
    ] as const;
    }


export const getCountRfControllerEnterQtyQueryOptions = <TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_enterQty>>, TError = unknown>(submitCountLineDto: SubmitCountLineDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_enterQty>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}
) => {

const {query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions} = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =  queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getCountRfControllerEnterQtyQueryKey(submitCountLineDto);



    const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_enterQty>>> = ({ signal }) => CountRfController_enterQty(submitCountLineDto, { signal, ...requestOptions });





   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_enterQty>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
}

export type CountRfControllerEnterQtyQueryResult = NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_enterQty>>>
export type CountRfControllerEnterQtyQueryError = unknown



export function useCountRfControllerEnterQty<TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_enterQty>>, TError = unknown>(
 submitCountLineDto: SubmitCountLineDto, options?: { query?:UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_enterQty>>, TError, TData>, request?: SecondParameter<typeof customInstance>}

 ):  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {

  const queryOptions = getCountRfControllerEnterQtyQueryOptions(submitCountLineDto,options)

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as  UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

  }
);}

   return  { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions} as UseQueryOptions<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof CountRfController_submitLine>>, TError, TData> & { queryKey: QueryKey }
